all.en: We propose a six month partnership with three carefully selected lifestyle influencers.
all.zh: 我們提案與三位精選的生活風格網紅進行為期六個月的合作。

all.en: The campaign aims to introduce our skincare line to a younger audience segment.
all.zh: 本活動旨在向更年輕的受眾族群介紹我們的保養品系列。

all.en: Our primary partner will be a creator with one point two million followers.
all.zh: 我們的主要合作對象將是一位擁有一百二十萬粉絲的創作者。

all.en: Her audience demographic aligns closely with our ideal customer profile.
all.zh: 她的受眾組成與我們的理想顧客輪廓高度吻合。

all.en: Two supporting partners each command audiences between one hundred and two hundred thousand.
all.zh: 兩位輔助合作夥伴各擁有十萬至二十萬之間的受眾。

all.en: Together these creators reach an estimated combined audience of two million.
all.zh: 這些創作者合計觸及估計兩百萬的受眾。

all.en: Each partner will produce four pieces of content over the campaign period.
all.zh: 每位合作夥伴將於活動期間產出四件內容作品。

all.en: Deliverables include reels, stories, and one long form tutorial each.
all.zh: 交付內容包含短影音、限時動態與各一支長版教學。

all.en: All content must feature our hero product used in authentic daily routines.
all.zh: 所有內容必須呈現我們的主打產品融入真實日常使用情境。

all.en: Creators retain creative freedom within our agreed brand guidelines.
all.zh: 創作者在雙方同意的品牌指南內保有創作自由。

all.en: Mandatory disclosure of the paid partnership will follow platform regulations.
all.zh: 付費合作的強制揭露將遵循平台規範。

all.en: Total proposed budget for the program is one hundred twenty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 本方案總提案預算為十二萬美元。

all.en: This sum covers talent fees, product samples, and a small amplification spend.
all.zh: 此金額涵蓋人才費用、產品樣品及小額擴散投放支出。

all.en: Each creator will also receive a unique discount code for tracking sales.
all.zh: 每位創作者也將獲得專屬折扣碼以追蹤銷售。

all.en: Key performance indicators include reach, saves, and code redemptions.
all.zh: 關鍵績效指標包含觸及人數、收藏數與折扣碼兌換數。

all.en: We target a minimum return on ad spend of three times the investment.
all.zh: 我們目標達到至少三倍投資的廣告投入報酬率。

all.en: Brand sentiment will be tracked through monthly social listening reports.
all.zh: 品牌情感將透過每月社群聆聽報告進行追蹤。

all.en: Performance reviews are scheduled at the end of months two and four.
all.zh: 成效檢視排定於第二個月與第四個月月底進行。

all.en: Contracts include exclusivity within the skincare category for the duration.
all.zh: 合約包含合作期間內保養品類別的排他條款。

all.en: Usage rights allow us to repurpose top performing content as paid ads.
all.zh: 使用權允許我們將表現頂尖的內容重新運用為付費廣告。

all.en: All contracts and creative briefs will be finalized by the end of next month.
all.zh: 所有合約與創意簡報將於下個月底前完成定稿。

all.en: The campaign is scheduled to launch in alignment with our spring product refresh.
all.zh: 本活動排定配合我們的春季產品更新同步啟動。

all.en: Please review the attached deck for full creator profiles and timelines.
all.zh: 請審閱隨附簡報以了解完整創作者輪廓與時程。

all.en: We welcome your questions and look forward to your approval to proceed.
all.zh: 歡迎您提出問題，期待您核准後續推進。
